title: 2 x 10mm Thin Gold Ribbon Champagne Gold Satin Ribbon 22m, 2/5 inch Slim Gold Ribbon for Gift Wrapping Wedding Car Christmas Tree Xmas Birthday Cake Hair Bow Florist Bouquet Crafts Decorations
features: ** 2 Rolls 10mm Wide Champagne Gold Ribbon ** -- We offer a variety of ribbon colors and widths to meet your needs: 0.6cm (0.23 inch), 1cm (0.4 inch), 2cm (0.8 inch), 2.5cm (1 inch), 4cm (1.5 inch), 5cm (2 inch), 7.5cm (3 inch), and more than 20 colors
** Premium Material ** -- Our ribbon is made of high quality polyester, Smooth surface, bright color, comfortable and soft, The length of each roll is: 22m

** Wide Range of Uses ** -- This champagne gold satin ribbon has a wide range of uses, such as: ribbon for gift wrapping, christmas ribbon for gift wrapping, wedding car ribbon, hair ribbon, hair bow ribbon, craft ribbon, birthday cake ribbon, present wrapping ribbon, bouquet ribbon, florist ribbon, decoration ribbon, and more...

** Usage Scenario ** -- This ribbon is sophisticated satin ribbon, perfect for gift wrapping, wedding car decoration, hotel decoration, party decorations, christmas presents wrapping, card invitation, hair bow, ornaments, handicrafts, and more...
** Buy With Confidence ** -- If you have any issue about the ribbon please contact us at any time, we will answer you within 24 hours and find a best solution for you
